location.office_time_required: 4 days a week in one of our SF Bay Area offices

level_signals: 8+ years of experience in product management at SaaS companies
Responsibilities spanning security, governance, trust, identity, data integrations
Comp range $160K-$240K base, consistent with senior IC PM at growth-stage startup

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 8+ years of experience in product management at SaaS companies, primarily serving large enterprises with responsibilities spanning security, governance, trust, identity, data integrations.
You have a strong technical background and experience with both UX and API driven products, integration paths, and 3rd party product partnerships.
You are an excellent written and verbal communicator.
You have a proven track record of taking ownership, taking initiative, and delivering results.
You collaborate effectively with cross-functional partners.
You have a learning and growth mindset.
You are mission-first and understand that your success is measured by your product and team's success.

scope.surface: Agent Security & Governance — explainable/transparent AI systems, AI risk identification and prevention, observability, security and privacy features around AI agents and underlying enterprise data
primary_metrics_inferred: Enterprise adoption of security and governance features
Reduction of AI risk vectors for customers
core_responsibilities: Spending a lot of time with our customers to deeply understand their knowledge needs
Developing key parts of our product roadmap, marrying customers' needs with our product vision
Empowering your team by giving context, setting direction, and building alignment
Driving customer-focused decisions, clear prioritization, and efficient execution
Coordinating cross-functionally with leadership, go-to-market teams, and other key stakeholders across the company
Building processes that will scale as our team and company go through rapid growth

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as potential eligibility alongside variable compensation

green_flags: High-impact, differentiated product area (AI security and governance) with growing enterprise demand
Glean recognized by Fast Company, CNBC, Forbes AI 50 — strong company credibility signals
Lean product team implies high ownership and visibility for the PM
Clear product domain stated (agent security, explainable AI, observability, privacy)
red_flags: Hybrid requirement of 4 days/week in SF Bay Area offices is very office-heavy and eliminates most remote candidates
No nice-to-haves listed — makes it harder to self-assess partial fit
Visa sponsorship not mentioned anywhere in the JD
Broad comp range ($160K-$240K) may indicate ambiguity in level targeting
8+ years requirement is high; combined with SF Bay Area 4-day hybrid, limits candidate pool significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required + comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and customer references)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from JD language 'factors such as location')
ambiguities: JD hashtag is #LI-HYBRID and body confirms 4 days/week in SF Bay Area — no contradiction, consistently hybrid/onsite-heavy.
Variable compensation and equity mentioned as potential eligibility but not guaranteed — structure not specified.
No nice-to-haves are explicitly listed; all requirements appear in a single 'About you' section and are treated as hard requirements.
